summary_one_line: Input must reach an unescaped quote/bracket char (", ', or ]) while scanning the DTD internal subset with state==0.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed XML prologue followed by a DOCTYPE whose internal-subset region presents an unescaped quote or ']' character to the chunk-scanner at line 11304 while the state machine is in the neutral state (state==0), so the scanner enters the quoted/bracket state instead of bailing at an earlier dispatch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds drive the scanner into the bracket/space sub-states the loser never reaches: at line 11261 the winner takes the ']' state True 4 times and at line 11275 the ' ' state True 12 times, and at line 11304 the winner records True hits (T=4) whereas the loser stays at T=0; the winning seed carries an intact '<?xml version="1.0"?>' / '<!DOCTYPE a SYSTEM "' structure that feeds the DTD scanner.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser (cmplog) seeds never enter the ']' or ' ' end-detection states (L11261 T=0, L11275 T=0) and never take the blocker's True side (L11304 T=0 F=84); the loser seed's DOCTYPE is corrupted ('a S[STEM') so the scanner does not arrive at the internal-subset quote/bracket dispatch in the neutral state.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient buckets reward inputs whose comparison operands are progressively closer (Hamming/prefix distance) to the structural literals the DTD scanner expects, smoothing the path to a quote/']' arriving while state==0; cmplog alone (input-to-state substitution plus only edge feedback, no CMP_MAP gradient) gets a flat edge signal and cannot retain the partial-match progress, so it stalls at the entry of the internal-subset scan. The winner-vs-loser delta is precisely the value_profile gradient feedback.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of the quote/bracket dispatch in the DTD internal-subset look-ahead scanner.
The true branch is the globally blocked side at this branch.
The only decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over cmplog with the value_profile technique delta.
The winner resolves the branch in 9 of 10 trials while the loser blocks in 8 of 10.
The winner enters the ']' end-detection state which the loser never reaches.
The winner enters the ' ' (blank) sub-state of the end detector while the loser does not.
At the blocker line the winner takes the true side four times while the loser never does.
The winner seed contains an intact XML prologue and DOCTYPE SYSTEM structure feeding the DTD scanner.
The loser seed's DOCTYPE is corrupted with a '[' substituted into the SYSTEM keyword region.
value_profile_cmplog adds CMP_MAP gradient buckets on top of cmplog's edge plus CMP-buffer signals.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
union of cmplog and value_profile — edge counters,
per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog's feedback is the same edge-bucket signal as naive, with the CMP buffer consumed only by the mutator, not by feedback.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
same edge-bucket signal as naive. The CMP buffer is
consumed by the mutator, not by feedback.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Lineage verification is not mandatory here: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient, not I2SRandReplace. The decisive delta is value_profile (winner=value_profile_cmplog, loser=cmplog); both fuzzers already carry I2SRandReplace, so the differentiator is the CMP_MAP gradient feedback that only the winner adds, evidenced by the winner alone entering the ']'/' ' end-detection states (DIVERGENT BRANCHES L11261/L11275) that cmplog's flat edge feedback cannot retain. No dash-row lineage check applies.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating the quote/bracket dispatch behind a multi-byte structural literal in which cmplog resolves the branch as fast as value_profile_cmplog (no gradient advantage) would refute CMP_MAP-gradient attribution and point back to plain I2S substitution or havoc.

weakest_evidence_point: Only one winner and one loser seed are available, so the inference that CMP_MAP gradient (rather than incidental havoc luck) drives the winner's progress into the ']'/' ' states rests on the divergent-branch hit pattern rather than direct gradient-bucket evidence.
